name: Edit an existing file
setup: echo 'def add(a, b):\n    return a - b' > /tmp/eval_math.py
task: There is a bug in /tmp/eval_math.py — the add function subtracts instead of adding. Fix it.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m', '/tmp/eval_math.py'); m = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(m); assert m.add(2, 3) == 5, f'Expected 5 got {m.add(2, 3)}'; print('OK')
